1→//
     2→//  AIChatViewModel.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  ViewModel for the AI FitOrb chat feature.
     6→//
     7→
     8→import Foundation
     9→import Swinject
    10→
    11→@MainActor
    12→@Observable
    13→final class AIChatViewModel: ErrorPresenting {
    14→
    15→    // MARK: - Properties
    16→
    17→    var messages: [AIChatMessage] = []
    18→    var inputText: String = ""
    19→    var isLoading: Bool = false
    20→    var isTyping: Bool = false
    21→    var errorMessage: ErrorMessage?
    22→    private(set) var quickActions: [String] = []
    23→
    24→    // MARK: - Private
    25→
    26→    private let resolver: Resolver
    27→    private let chatRepository: ChatRepository?
    28→    private let featureGating: FeatureGating?
    29→    private let usageTracker: AIUsageTracking?
    30→    private let profileRepository: UserProfileRepository?
    31→    private let statsRepository: UserStatsRepository?
    32→    private var typingTask: Task<Void, Never>?
    33→    private var _cachedChatService: AIChatService?
    34→
    35→    /// Creates on-demand so API key saved after launch takes effect.
    36→    private var chatService: AIChatService? {
    37→        if let cached = _cachedChatService { return cached }
    38→        guard let client = NewOpenAIClient.fromUserKey(),
    39→              let profileRepo = resolver.resolve(UserProfileRepository.self),
    40→              let statsRepo = resolver.resolve(UserStatsRepository.self),
    41→              let historyRepo = resolver.resolve(WorkoutHistoryRepository.self)
    42→        else { return nil }
    43→        let service = AIChatService(
    44→            client: client,
    45→            profileRepository: profileRepo,
    46→            statsRepository: statsRepo,
    47→            historyRepository: historyRepo
    48→        )
    49→        _cachedChatService = service
    50→        return service
    51→    }
    52→
    53→    // MARK: - Initialization
    54→
    55→    init(resolver: Resolver) {
    56→        self.resolver = resolver
    57→        self.chatRepository = resolver.resolve(ChatRepository.self)
    58→        self.featureGating = resolver.resolve(FeatureGating.self)
    59→        self.usageTracker = resolver.resolve(AIUsageTracking.self)
    60→        self.profileRepository = resolver.resolve(UserProfileRepository.self)
    61→        self.statsRepository = resolver.resolve(UserStatsRepository.self)
    62→        self.quickActions = Self.defaultQuickActions
    63→    }
    64→
    65→    // MARK: - Computed
    66→
    67→    var isChatAvailable: Bool {
    68→        chatService != nil
    69→    }
    70→
    71→    // MARK: - Actions
    72→
    73→    func loadHistory() async {
    74→        guard let repo = chatRepository else { return }
    75→        do {
    76→            messages = try await repo.loadMessages(limit: 50)
    77→        } catch {
    78→            handleError(error)
    79→        }
    80→        await loadQuickActions()
    81→    }
    82→
    83→    func sendMessage() {
    84→        let text = inputText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
    85→        guard !text.isEmpty, !isLoading, !isTyping else { return }
    86→
    87→        guard chatService != nil else {
    88→            errorMessage = ErrorMessage(
    89→                title: "error.openai.not_configured.title".localized,
    90→                message: "fitorb.error_no_api_key".localized,
    91→                action: .dismiss
    92→            )
    93→            return
    94→        }
    95→
    96→        // Cancel any ongoing typing animation
    97→        typingTask?.cancel()
    98→        typingTask = nil
    99→
   100→        let userMessage = AIChatMessage(role: .user, content: text)
   101→        messages.append(userMessage)
   102→        inputText = ""
   103→        isLoading = true
   104→        errorMessage = nil
   105→
   106→        Task {
   107→            // Check message limit for free users
   108→            if let gating = featureGating {
   109→                let access = await gating.checkAccess(to: .aiChat)
   110→                guard access.isAllowed else {
   111→                    isLoading = false
   112→                    // Remove the user message we just appended
   113→                    if messages.last?.role == .user {
   114→                        messages.removeLast()
   115→                    }
   116→                    handleError(DomainError.chatMessageLimitReached)
   117→                    return
   118→                }
   119→            }
   120→
   121→            // Save user message
   122→            try? await chatRepository?.saveMessage(userMessage)
   123→
   124→            do {
   125→                let response = try await chatService!.sendMessage(text, history: messages)
   126→
   127→                // Register chat usage
   128→                await usageTracker?.registerChatUsage()
   129→
   130→                // Animate typing effect
   131→                await animateTyping(response: response)
   132→            } catch {
   133→                handleError(error)
   134→            }
   135→            isLoading = false
   136→        }
   137→    }
   138→
   139→    func clearHistory() async {
   140→        typingTask?.cancel()
   141→        typingTask = nil
   142→        isTyping = false
   143→        messages.removeAll()
   144→        try? await chatRepository?.clearHistory()
   145→        await chatService?.invalidatePromptCache()
   146→        await loadQuickActions()
   147→    }
   148→
   149→    // MARK: - Typing Animation
   150→
   151→    private func animateTyping(response: String) async {
   152→        // Create assistant message with empty content
   153→        let messageId = UUID()
   154→        let placeholder = AIChatMessage(id: messageId, role: .assistant, content: "")
   155→        messages.append(placeholder)
   156→        isLoading = false
   157→        isTyping = true
   158→
   159→        let chunkSize = 5
   160→        var currentIndex = response.startIndex
   161→
   162→        typingTask = Task { [weak self] in
   163→            while currentIndex < response.endIndex && !Task.isCancelled {
   164→                let nextIndex = response.index(currentIndex, offsetBy: chunkSize, limitedBy: response.endIndex) ?? response.endIndex
   165→                let partialContent = String(response[response.startIndex..<nextIndex])
   166→                currentIndex = nextIndex
   167→
   168→                await MainActor.run {
   169→                    guard let self else { return }
   170→                    // Replace last message with updated content
   171→                    if let lastIndex = self.messages.lastIndex(where: { $0.id == messageId }) {
   172→                        self.messages[lastIndex] = AIChatMessage(
   173→                            id: messageId,
   174→                            role: .assistant,
   175→                            content: partialContent,
   176→                            timestamp: placeholder.timestamp
   177→                        )
   178→                    }
   179→                }
   180→
   181→                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 15_000_000) // 15ms
   182→            }
   183→
   184→            // Save final message after animation
   185→            let finalMessage = AIChatMessage(
   186→                id: messageId,
   187→                role: .assistant,
   188→                content: response,
   189→                timestamp: placeholder.timestamp
   190→            )
   191→
   192→            await MainActor.run { [weak self] in
   193→                guard let self else { return }
   194→                if let lastIndex = self.messages.lastIndex(where: { $0.id == messageId }) {
   195→                    self.messages[lastIndex] = finalMessage
   196→                }
   197→                self.isTyping = false
   198→            }
   199→
   200→            try? await self?.chatRepository?.saveMessage(finalMessage)
   201→        }
   202→    }
   203→
   204→    // MARK: - Quick Actions
   205→
   206→    private static var defaultQuickActions: [String] {
   207→        [
   208→            "fitorb.quick.plan_workout".localized,
   209→            "fitorb.quick.suggest_exercises".localized,
   210→            "fitorb.quick.warmup".localized,
   211→            "fitorb.quick.recovery".localized
   212→        ]
   213→    }
   214→
   215→    private func loadQuickActions() async {
   216→        var actions: [String] = []
   217→
   218→        let profile = try? await profileRepository?.loadProfile()
   219→        let stats = try? await statsRepository?.getCurrentStats()
   220→
   221→        let hour = Calendar.current.component(.hour, from: Date())
   222→
   223→        // Time-based suggestions
   224→        if hour < 12 {
   225→            actions.append("fitorb.quick.morning_warmup".localized)
   226→        } else if hour >= 20 {
   227→            actions.append("fitorb.quick.evening_stretch".localized)
   228→        }
   229→
   230→        // Workout status today
   231→        if let lastDate = stats?.lastWorkoutDate,
   232→           Calendar.current.isDateInToday(lastDate) {
   233→            actions.append("fitorb.quick.recovery".localized)
   234→        } else {
   235→            actions.append("fitorb.quick.suggest_today".localized)
   236→        }
   237→
   238→        // Goal-specific suggestions
   239→        if let goal = profile?.mainGoal {
   240→            switch goal {
   241→            case .hypertrophy:
   242→                actions.append("fitorb.quick.muscle_tips".localized)
   243→            case .weightLoss:
   244→                actions.append("fitorb.quick.fat_burn_tips".localized)
   245→            case .endurance:
   246→                actions.append("fitorb.quick.endurance_tips".localized)
   247→            case .conditioning, .performance:
   248→                actions.append("fitorb.quick.performance_tips".localized)
   249→            }
   250→        }
   251→
   252→        // Always include a generic option
   253→        actions.append("fitorb.quick.plan_workout".localized)
   254→
   255→        // Limit to 4 chips
   256→        quickActions = Array(actions.prefix(4))
   257→
   258→        // Fallback if empty
   259→        if quickActions.isEmpty {
   260→            quickActions = Self.defaultQuickActions
   261→        }
   262→    }
   263→}
   264→

1→//
     2→//  AIChatService.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Wraps NewOpenAIClient for conversational chat mode (FitOrb).
     6→//
     7→
     8→import Foundation
     9→
    10→actor AIChatService {
    11→
    12→    // MARK: - Types
    13→
    14→    enum ServiceError: LocalizedError {
    15→        case clientUnavailable
    16→        case emptyResponse
    17→
    18→        var errorDescription: String? {
    19→            switch self {
    20→            case .clientUnavailable:
    21→                return "OpenAI client is not available. Please configure your API key."
    22→            case .emptyResponse:
    23→                return "Received an empty response from the assistant."
    24→            }
    25→        }
    26→    }
    27→
    28→    // MARK: - Properties
    29→
    30→    private let client: NewOpenAIClient
    31→    private let profileRepository: UserProfileRepository
    32→    private let statsRepository: UserStatsRepository
    33→    private let historyRepository: WorkoutHistoryRepository
    34→    private let promptBuilder = ChatSystemPromptBuilder()
    35→
    36→    private var cachedSystemPrompt: String?
    37→
    38→    // MARK: - Initialization
    39→
    40→    init(
    41→        client: NewOpenAIClient,
    42→        profileRepository: UserProfileRepository,
    43→        statsRepository: UserStatsRepository,
    44→        historyRepository: WorkoutHistoryRepository
    45→    ) {
    46→        self.client = client
    47→        self.profileRepository = profileRepository
    48→        self.statsRepository = statsRepository
    49→        self.historyRepository = historyRepository
    50→    }
    51→
    52→    // MARK: - Public API
    53→
    54→    /// Sends a message along with the conversation history and returns the assistant response.
    55→    func sendMessage(_ message: String, history: [AIChatMessage]) async throws -> String {
    56→        let systemPrompt = await buildContextualPrompt()
    57→
    58→        var chatMessages: [[String: String]] = [
    59→            ["role": "system", "content": systemPrompt]
    60→        ]
    61→
    62→        for msg in history where msg.role != .system {
    63→            chatMessages.append([
    64→                "role": msg.role.rawValue,
    65→                "content": msg.content
    66→            ])
    67→        }
    68→
    69→        chatMessages.append([
    70→            "role": "user",
    71→            "content": message
    72→        ])
    73→
    74→        return try await client.sendChat(messages: chatMessages, maxTokens: 1000, temperature: 0.7)
    75→    }
    76→
    77→    /// Invalidates cached system prompt (call when starting new conversation).
    78→    func invalidatePromptCache() {
    79→        cachedSystemPrompt = nil
    80→    }
    81→
    82→    // MARK: - Private
    83→
    84→    private func buildContextualPrompt() async -> String {
    85→        if let cached = cachedSystemPrompt {
    86→            return cached
    87→        }
    88→
    89→        do {
    90→            let profile = try await profileRepository.loadProfile()
    91→            let stats = try await statsRepository.getCurrentStats()
    92→            let recentWorkouts = try await historyRepository.listEntries(limit: 3, offset: 0)
    93→
    94→            let prompt = promptBuilder.buildSystemPrompt(
    95→                profile: profile,
    96→                stats: stats,
    97→                recentWorkouts: recentWorkouts
    98→            )
    99→            cachedSystemPrompt = prompt
   100→            return prompt
   101→        } catch {
   102→            // Fallback to generic prompt if repos fail
   103→            let prompt = promptBuilder.buildSystemPrompt(
   104→                profile: nil,
   105→                stats: nil,
   106→                recentWorkouts: []
   107→            )
   108→            cachedSystemPrompt = prompt
   109→            return prompt
   110→        }
   111→    }
   112→}
   113→

1→//
     2→//  EntitlementPolicy.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Política centralizada de acesso a features baseada no entitlement.
     6→//
     7→
     8→import Foundation
     9→
    10→// MARK: - Feature Enum
    11→
    12→/// Features que requerem verificação de acesso
    13→enum ProFeature: String, CaseIterable {
    14→    // Treinos IA
    15→    case aiWorkoutGeneration = "ai_workout_generation"
    16→    case aiExerciseSubstitution = "ai_exercise_substitution"
    17→
    18→    // Tracking avançado
    19→    case unlimitedHistory = "unlimited_history"
    20→    case advancedDOMSAdjustment = "advanced_doms_adjustment"
    21→
    22→    // Biblioteca
    23→    case premiumPrograms = "premium_programs"
    24→
    25→    // Configurações
    26→    case customizableSettings = "customizable_settings"
    27→
    28→    // Personal Trainer
    29→    case personalTrainer = "personal_trainer"
    30→    case trainerWorkouts = "trainer_workouts"
    31→
    32→    // Social
    33→    case simultaneousChallenges = "simultaneous_challenges"
    34→
    35→    // AI Chat
    36→    case aiChat = "ai_chat"
    37→
    38→    var displayName: String {
    39→        switch self {
    40→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration: return "Treinos personalizados por IA"
    41→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution: return "Substituição inteligente de exercícios"
    42→        case .unlimitedHistory: return "Histórico ilimitado"
    43→        case .advancedDOMSAdjustment: return "Ajuste por dor muscular"
    44→        case .premiumPrograms: return "Programas premium"
    45→        case .customizableSettings: return "Configurações avançadas"
    46→        case .personalTrainer: return "Personal Trainer"
    47→        case .trainerWorkouts: return "Treinos do Personal"
    48→        case .simultaneousChallenges: return "Desafios simultâneos ilimitados"
    49→        case .aiChat: return "Assistente IA FitOrb"
    50→        }
    51→    }
    52→}
    53→
    54→// MARK: - Access Result
    55→
    56→/// Resultado da verificação de acesso
    57→enum FeatureAccessResult {
    58→    case allowed
    59→    case limitReached(remaining: Int, limit: Int)
    60→    case requiresPro(feature: ProFeature)
    61→    case trialExpired
    62→    case featureDisabled(reason: String)
    63→
    64→    var isAllowed: Bool {
    65→        if case .allowed = self { return true }
    66→        return false
    67→    }
    68→
    69→    /// Indicates if the result is due to a disabled feature flag.
    70→    var isFeatureDisabled: Bool {
    71→        if case .featureDisabled = self { return true }
    72→        return false
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    var message: String {
    76→        switch self {
    77→        case .allowed:
    78→            return ""
    79→        case .limitReached(_, let limit):
    80→            return "Você atingiu o limite de \(limit) usos. Desbloqueie o Pro para mais."
    81→        case .requiresPro(let feature):
    82→            return "\(feature.displayName) é um recurso Pro. Desbloqueie o Pro para acessar."
    83→        case .trialExpired:
    84→            return "Seu período de teste terminou. Desbloqueie o Pro para continuar."
    85→        case .featureDisabled(let reason):
    86→            return reason
    87→        }
    88→    }
    89→}
    90→
    91→// MARK: - Entitlement Policy
    92→
    93→/// Política centralizada para verificação de acesso a features
    94→struct EntitlementPolicy {
    95→
    96→    // MARK: - Limites
    97→
    98→    /// Número de treinos IA por semana para usuários Free
    99→    static let freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek = 1
   100→
   101→    /// Número de treinos IA por dia para usuários Pro
   102→    static let proAIWorkoutsPerDay = 2
   103→
   104→    /// Dias de histórico para usuários Free
   105→    static let freeHistoryDaysLimit = 7
   106→
   107→    /// Número máximo de desafios simultâneos para Free
   108→    static let freeChallengesLimit = 5
   109→
   110→    /// Numero de mensagens AI chat por dia para usuarios Free
   111→    static let freeAIChatMessagesPerDay = 5
   112→
   113→    // MARK: - Verificação de Acesso
   114→
   115→    /// Verifica se o usuário pode acessar uma feature
   116→    /// - Parameters:
   117→    ///   - feature: Feature a ser verificada
   118→    ///   - entitlement: Entitlement atual do usuário
   119→    ///   - usageCount: Uso atual (semanal para Free AI, diário para Pro AI, contagem ativa para desafios)
   120→    /// - Returns: Resultado da verificação
   121→    static func canAccess(
   122→        _ feature: ProFeature,
   123→        entitlement: ProEntitlement,
   124→        usageCount: Int = 0
   125→    ) -> FeatureAccessResult {
   126→
   127→        // Pro tem acesso a tudo (com limites diários em IA)
   128→        if entitlement.isPro {
   129→            if let expiration = entitlement.expirationDate, expiration < Date() {
   130→                return .trialExpired
   131→            }
   132→
   133→            switch feature {
   134→            case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   135→                if usageCount >= proAIWorkoutsPerDay {
   136→                    return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: proAIWorkoutsPerDay)
   137→                }
   138→                return .allowed
   139→            case .aiChat:
   140→                return .allowed
   141→            default:
   142→                return .allowed
   143→            }
   144→        }
   145→
   146→        // Verificar features específicas para Free
   147→        switch feature {
   148→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   149→            if usageCount >= freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek {
   150→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek)
   151→            }
   152→            return .allowed
   153→
   154→        case .simultaneousChallenges:
   155→            if usageCount >= freeChallengesLimit {
   156→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeChallengesLimit)
   157→            }
   158→            return .allowed
   159→
   160→        case .aiChat:
   161→            if usageCount >= freeAIChatMessagesPerDay {
   162→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeAIChatMessagesPerDay)
   163→            }
   164→            return .allowed
   165→
   166→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution,
   167→             .unlimitedHistory,
   168→             .advancedDOMSAdjustment,
   169→             .premiumPrograms,
   170→             .customizableSettings,
   171→             .personalTrainer,
   172→             .trainerWorkouts:
   173→            return .requiresPro(feature: feature)
   174→        }
   175→    }
   176→
   177→    /// Verifica se uma feature é totalmente bloqueada para Free
   178→    static func isProOnly(_ feature: ProFeature) -> Bool {
   179→        switch feature {
   180→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration, .simultaneousChallenges, .aiChat:
   181→            return false // Free tem acesso limitado
   182→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution,
   183→             .unlimitedHistory,
   184→             .advancedDOMSAdjustment,
   185→             .premiumPrograms,
   186→             .customizableSettings,
   187→             .personalTrainer,
   188→             .trainerWorkouts:
   189→            return true
   190→        }
   191→    }
   192→
   193→    /// Retorna o limite de uso para uma feature
   194→    static func usageLimit(for feature: ProFeature, entitlement: ProEntitlement) -> (limit: Int, period: String)? {
   195→        switch feature {
   196→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   197→            if entitlement.isPro {
   198→                return (proAIWorkoutsPerDay, "dia")
   199→            } else {
   200→                return (freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek, "semana")
   201→            }
   202→        case .simultaneousChallenges:
   203→            if entitlement.isPro {
   204→                return nil // ilimitado
   205→            } else {
   206→                return (freeChallengesLimit, "simultâneos")
   207→            }
   208→        case .aiChat:
   209→            if entitlement.isPro {
   210→                return nil // ilimitado
   211→            } else {
   212→                return (freeAIChatMessagesPerDay, "dia")
   213→            }
   214→        default:
   215→            return nil
   216→        }
   217→    }
   218→
   219→    // MARK: - Helpers para UI
   220→
   221→    /// Retorna lista de features que são Pro-only para exibição
   222→    static var proOnlyFeatures: [ProFeature] {
   223→        ProFeature.allCases.filter { isProOnly($0) }
   224→    }
   225→
   226→    /// Retorna lista de features com limites para Free
   227→    static var limitedFreeFeatures: [(feature: ProFeature, freeLimit: String, proLimit: String)] {
   228→        [
   229→            (.aiWorkoutGeneration, "1/semana", "2/dia"),
   230→            (.simultaneousChallenges, "5", "∞"),
   231→            (.aiChat, "5/dia", "ilimitado")
   232→        ]
   233→    }
   234→}
   235→
   236→// MARK: - Convenience Extensions
   237→
   238→extension ProEntitlement {
   239→    /// Verifica acesso a uma feature usando a policy centralizada
   240→    func canAccess(_ feature: ProFeature, usageCount: Int = 0) -> FeatureAccessResult {
   241→        EntitlementPolicy.canAccess(feature, entitlement: self, usageCount: usageCount)
   242→    }
   243→
   244→    /// Verifica se tem acesso a uma feature (simplificado)
   245→    func hasAccess(to feature: ProFeature) -> Bool {
   246→        canAccess(feature).isAllowed
   247→    }
   248→}
   249→

Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive summary:

## FitOrb Chat Feature - Complete Technical Overview

I've analyzed the FitToday iOS app's FitOrb chat system. Here's a comprehensive breakdown of all components:

### 1. **FitOrb Chat - Views & ViewModels**

**Location**: `/Users/viniciuscarvalho/Documents/FitToday/FitToday/FitToday/Presentation/Features/AIChat/`

**Main Components:**
- **AIChatView.swift** - Main chat UI with:
  - Empty state showing FitOrbView (animated orb)
  - Messages list with scrolling
  - Message bubbles (user messages right-aligned, assistant left-aligned)
  - Input bar with send button
  - Loading/typing animations
  - Clear chat confirmation dialog
  - Settings toolbar button

- **AIChatViewModel.swift** (@Observable, @MainActor) - Manages:
  - `messages: [AIChatMessage]` - All chat messages
  - `inputText: String` - User input
  - `isLoading: Bool` - Loading state
  - `isTyping: Bool` - Typing animation state
  - `quickActions: [String]` - Suggestion chips
  - Message limit checking via `featureGating`
  - Typing animation with character-by-character reveal (15ms per chunk)

- **FitOrbView.swift** - Animated branding component:
  - Pulsing circular gradient (brand colors)
  - Shadow animation
  - Sparkle icon overlay
  - Title and subtitle

### 2. **Message Model & Storage**

**Domain Layer**:
- **AIChatMessage.swift**:
  ```swift
  struct AIChatMessage: Identifiable, Codable, Hashable {
      let id: UUID
      let role: Role  // .user, .assistant, .system
      let content: String
      let timestamp: Date
  }
  ```

**Data Layer**:
- **SDChatMessage.swift** - SwiftData model for persistence
- **ChatMessageMapper.swift** - Maps between domain and data models
- **SwiftDataChatRepository.swift** - Handles:
  - `loadMessages(limit: 50)` - Load chat history
  - `saveMessage()` - Save individual messages
  - `clearHistory()` - Wipe all messages
  - `messageCount()` - Get total message count

### 3. **Chat Service & OpenAI Integration**

**Location**: `/Users/viniciuscarvalho/Documents/FitToday/FitToday/FitToday/Data/Services/AIChatService.swift`

**AIChatService** (Actor):
- Wraps `NewOpenAIClient` for conversational mode
- `sendMessage(_ message: String, history: [AIChatMessage])` - Core API
- Builds contextual system prompts using user profile, stats, and recent workouts
- Caches system prompt (invalidated on clear)
- Returns raw string response (no streaming)
- Max tokens: 1000, Temperature: 0.7

### 4. **Quick Action Chips (Suggestion Chips)**

**Implementation in AIChatViewModel.loadQuickActions()**:

```swift
// Time-based suggestions
if hour < 12 {
    actions.append("Aquecimento matinal")
} else if hour >= 20 {
    actions.append("Alongamento noturno")
}

// Workout status
if lastWorkoutToday {
    actions.append("Dicas de recuperação")
} else {
    actions.append("Sugerir treino de hoje")
}

// Goal-specific
switch mainGoal {
    case .hypertrophy: "Dicas para hipertrofia"
    case .weightLoss: "Dicas para emagrecer"
    case .endurance: "Dicas de resistência"
    case .conditioning, .performance: "Dicas de performance"
}

// Limit to 4 chips
quickActions = Array(actions.prefix(4))
```

**UI in AIChatView**:
```swift
ForEach(viewModel.quickActions, id: \.self) { action in
    Button {
        viewModel.inputText = action
        viewModel.sendMessage()
    } label: {
        Text(action)
            .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 14, weight: .semiBold))
            .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.brandPrimary)
            .padding(.horizontal, .md)
            .padding(.vertical, .sm)
            .background(FitTodayColor.surfaceElevated)
            .clipShape(Capsule())
    }
}
```

### 5. **Paywall & Subscription System**

**Location**: `/Users/viniciuscarvalho/Documents/FitToday/FitToday/FitToday/Presentation/Features/Pro/`

**OptimizedPaywallView.swift**:
- One-time purchase model (non-consumable)
- Displays lifetime price
- Feature comparison table (Free vs Pro)
- Purchase and Restore buttons
- Uses `StoreKitService` for transactions

**StoreKitService** (@Observable, @MainActor):
- `loadProducts()` - Fetch from App Store
- `purchase(_ product: Product)` - Process purchase
- `restorePurchases()` - Restore previous purchases
- `refreshPurchaseStatus()` - Check active entitlements
- `getCurrentEntitlement()` - Get current Pro status
- Listens to `Transaction.updates` continuously

**StoreKitConstants**:
- Defines product IDs (e.g., `StoreKitProductID.proLifetime`)

### 6. **Feature Gating & Access Control**

**Location**: `/Users/viniciuscarvalho/Documents/FitToday/FitToday/FitToday/Domain/UseCases/FeatureGatingUseCase.swift`

**FeatureGating Protocol**:
```swift
func checkAccess(to feature: ProFeature) async -> FeatureAccessResult
func currentEntitlement() async throws -> ProEntitlement
func entitlementStream() -> AsyncStream<ProEntitlement>
```

**ProFeature Enum**:
```swift
enum ProFeature {
    case aiChat = "ai_chat"
    case aiWorkoutGeneration
    case personalTrainer
    case trainerWorkouts
    // ... 7 total features
}
```

**FeatureAccessResult**:
```swift
enum FeatureAccessResult {
    case allowed
    case limitReached(remaining: Int, limit: Int)
    case requiresPro(feature: ProFeature)
    case trialExpired
    case featureDisabled(reason: String)
}
```

### 7. **Entitlement Policy & Limits**

**Location**: `/Users/viniciuscarvalho/Documents/FitToday/FitToday/FitToday/Domain/Entities/EntitlementPolicy.swift`

**AI Chat Limits**:
```swift
static let freeAIChatMessagesPerDay = 5    // Free users
// Pro users: unlimited
```

**How it works**:
1. `AIChatViewModel.sendMessage()` checks feature access
2. Calls `featureGating.checkAccess(to: .aiChat)`
3. `FeatureGatingUseCase` gets:
   - Current entitlement (Pro or Free)
   - Daily chat usage count from `usageTracker`
4. `EntitlementPolicy.canAccess()` determines access
5. If limit reached, throws `DomainError.chatMessageLimitReached`

**Usage Tracking** (`SimpleAIUsageTracker`):
- Tracks daily chat messages per day
- Uses `UserDefaults` keys: `"ai_chat_daily_count"`, `"ai_chat_last_date"`
- Resets daily at day boundary

### 8. **Error Handling**

## FitOrb Chat Feature - Complete Technical Overview

I've analyzed the FitToday iOS app's FitOrb chat system. Here's a comprehensive breakdown of all components:

### 1. **FitOrb Chat - Views & ViewModels**

**Location**: `/Users/viniciuscarvalho/Documents/FitToday/FitToday/FitToday/Presentation/Features/AIChat/`

**Main Components:**
- **AIChatView.swift** - Main chat UI with:
  - Empty state showing FitOrbView (animated orb)
  - Messages list with scrolling
  - Message bubbles (user messages right-aligned, assistant left-aligned)
  - Input bar with send button
  - Loading/typing animations
  - Clear chat confirmation dialog
  - Settings toolbar button

- **AIChatViewModel.swift** (@Observable, @MainActor) - Manages:
  - `messages: [AIChatMessage]` - All chat messages
  - `inputText: String` - User input
  - `isLoading: Bool` - Loading state
  - `isTyping: Bool` - Typing animation state
  - `quickActions: [String]` - Suggestion chips
  - Message limit checking via `featureGating`
  - Typing animation with character-by-character reveal (15ms per chunk)

- **FitOrbView.swift** - Animated branding component:
  - Pulsing circular gradient (brand colors)
  - Shadow animation
  - Sparkle icon overlay
  - Title and subtitle

### 2. **Message Model & Storage**

**Domain Layer**:
- **AIChatMessage.swift**:
  ```swift
  struct AIChatMessage: Identifiable, Codable, Hashable {
      let id: UUID
      let role: Role  // .user, .assistant, .system
      let content: String
      let timestamp: Date
  }
  ```

**Data Layer**:
- **SDChatMessage.swift** - SwiftData model for persistence
- **ChatMessageMapper.swift** - Maps between domain and data models
- **SwiftDataChatRepository.swift** - Handles:
  - `loadMessages(limit: 50)` - Load chat history
  - `saveMessage()` - Save individual messages
  - `clearHistory()` - Wipe all messages
  - `messageCount()` - Get total message count

### 3. **Chat Service & OpenAI Integration**

**Location**: `/Users/viniciuscarvalho/Documents/FitToday/FitToday/FitToday/Data/Services/AIChatService.swift`

**AIChatService** (Actor):
- Wraps `NewOpenAIClient` for conversational mode
- `sendMessage(_ message: String, history: [AIChatMessage])` - Core API
- Builds contextual system prompts using user profile, stats, and recent workouts
- Caches system prompt (invalidated on clear)
- Returns raw string response (no streaming)
- Max tokens: 1000, Temperature: 0.7

### 4. **Quick Action Chips (Suggestion Chips)**

**Implementation in AIChatViewModel.loadQuickActions()**:

```swift
// Time-based suggestions
if hour < 12 {
    actions.append("Aquecimento matinal")
} else if hour >= 20 {
    actions.append("Alongamento noturno")
}

// Workout status
if lastWorkoutToday {
    actions.append("Dicas de recuperação")
} else {
    actions.append("Sugerir treino de hoje")
}

// Goal-specific
switch mainGoal {
    case .hypertrophy: "Dicas para hipertrofia"
    case .weightLoss: "Dicas para emagrecer"
    case .endurance: "Dicas de resistência"
    case .conditioning, .performance: "Dicas de performance"
}

// Limit to 4 chips
quickActions = Array(actions.prefix(4))
```

**UI in AIChatView**:
```swift
ForEach(viewModel.quickActions, id: \.self) { action in
    Button {
        viewModel.inputText = action
        viewModel.sendMessage()
    } label: {
        Text(action)
            .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 14, weight: .semiBold))
            .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.brandPrimary)
            .padding(.horizontal, .md)
            .padding(.vertical, .sm)
            .background(FitTodayColor.surfaceElevated)
            .clipShape(Capsule())
    }
}
```

### 5. **Paywall & Subscription System**

**Location**: `/Users/viniciuscarvalho/Documents/FitToday/FitToday/FitToday/Presentation/Features/Pro/`

**OptimizedPaywallView.swift**:
- One-time purchase model (non-consumable)
- Displays lifetime price
- Feature comparison table (Free vs Pro)
- Purchase and Restore buttons
- Uses `StoreKitService` for transactions

**StoreKitService** (@Observable, @MainActor):
- `loadProducts()` - Fetch from App Store
- `purchase(_ product: Product)` - Process purchase
- `restorePurchases()` - Restore previous purchases
- `refreshPurchaseStatus()` - Check active entitlements
- `getCurrentEntitlement()` - Get current Pro status
- Listens to `Transaction.updates` continuously

**StoreKitConstants**:
- Defines product IDs (e.g., `StoreKitProductID.proLifetime`)

### 6. **Feature Gating & Access Control**

**Location**: `/Users/viniciuscarvalho/Documents/FitToday/FitToday/FitToday/Domain/UseCases/FeatureGatingUseCase.swift`

**FeatureGating Protocol**:
```swift
func checkAccess(to feature: ProFeature) async -> FeatureAccessResult
func currentEntitlement() async throws -> ProEntitlement
func entitlementStream() -> AsyncStream<ProEntitlement>
```

**ProFeature Enum**:
```swift
enum ProFeature {
    case aiChat = "ai_chat"
    case aiWorkoutGeneration
    case personalTrainer
    case trainerWorkouts
    // ... 7 total features
}
```

**FeatureAccessResult**:
```swift
enum FeatureAccessResult {
    case allowed
    case limitReached(remaining: Int, limit: Int)
    case requiresPro(feature: ProFeature)
    case trialExpired
    case featureDisabled(reason: String)
}
```

### 7. **Entitlement Policy & Limits**

**Location**: `/Users/viniciuscarvalho/Documents/FitToday/FitToday/FitToday/Domain/Entities/EntitlementPolicy.swift`

**AI Chat Limits**:
```swift
static let freeAIChatMessagesPerDay = 5    // Free users
// Pro users: unlimited
```

**How it works**:
1. `AIChatViewModel.sendMessage()` checks feature access
2. Calls `featureGating.checkAccess(to: .aiChat)`
3. `FeatureGatingUseCase` gets:
   - Current entitlement (Pro or Free)
   - Daily chat usage count from `usageTracker`
4. `EntitlementPolicy.canAccess()` determines access
5. If limit reached, throws `DomainError.chatMessageLimitReached`

**Usage Tracking** (`SimpleAIUsageTracker`):
- Tracks daily chat messages per day
- Uses `UserDefaults` keys: `"ai_chat_daily_count"`, `"ai_chat_last_date"`
- Resets daily at day boundary

### 8. **Error Handling**

**DomainError.swift**:
```swift
case chatMessageLimitReached
case chatServiceUnavailable
```

**ErrorMapper.swift** (case .chatMessageLimitReached):
```swift
title: "fitorb.limit_reached.title".localized
message: "fitorb.limit_reached.message".localized
```

"fitorb.limit_reached.message" = "Você atingiu o limite de mensagens diárias. Desbloqueie o Pro para mensagens ilimitadas."
```

```

Currently, the feature gating checks access when the user sends a message via `sendMessage()`. The check uses `featureGating.checkAccess(to: .aiChat)` which tracks daily message count.

2. After the first interaction, if they want to send MORE messages or click on suggestion chips, they should see a paywall

1→//
     2→//  AIChatViewModel.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  ViewModel for the AI FitOrb chat feature.
     6→//
     7→
     8→import Foundation
     9→import Swinject
    10→
    11→@MainActor
    12→@Observable
    13→final class AIChatViewModel: ErrorPresenting {
    14→
    15→    // MARK: - Properties
    16→
    17→    var messages: [AIChatMessage] = []
    18→    var inputText: String = ""
    19→    var isLoading: Bool = false
    20→    var isTyping: Bool = false
    21→    var errorMessage: ErrorMessage?
    22→    private(set) var quickActions: [String] = []
    23→
    24→    // MARK: - Private
    25→
    26→    private let resolver: Resolver
    27→    private let chatRepository: ChatRepository?
    28→    private let featureGating: FeatureGating?
    29→    private let usageTracker: AIUsageTracking?
    30→    private let profileRepository: UserProfileRepository?
    31→    private let statsRepository: UserStatsRepository?
    32→    private var typingTask: Task<Void, Never>?
    33→    private var _cachedChatService: AIChatService?
    34→
    35→    /// Creates on-demand so API key saved after launch takes effect.
    36→    private var chatService: AIChatService? {
    37→        if let cached = _cachedChatService { return cached }
    38→        guard let client = NewOpenAIClient.fromUserKey(),
    39→              let profileRepo = resolver.resolve(UserProfileRepository.self),
    40→              let statsRepo = resolver.resolve(UserStatsRepository.self),
    41→              let historyRepo = resolver.resolve(WorkoutHistoryRepository.self)
    42→        else { return nil }
    43→        let service = AIChatService(
    44→            client: client,
    45→            profileRepository: profileRepo,
    46→            statsRepository: statsRepo,
    47→            historyRepository: historyRepo
    48→        )
    49→        _cachedChatService = service
    50→        return service
    51→    }
    52→
    53→    // MARK: - Initialization
    54→
    55→    init(resolver: Resolver) {
    56→        self.resolver = resolver
    57→        self.chatRepository = resolver.resolve(ChatRepository.self)
    58→        self.featureGating = resolver.resolve(FeatureGating.self)
    59→        self.usageTracker = resolver.resolve(AIUsageTracking.self)
    60→        self.profileRepository = resolver.resolve(UserProfileRepository.self)
    61→        self.statsRepository = resolver.resolve(UserStatsRepository.self)
    62→        self.quickActions = Self.defaultQuickActions
    63→    }
    64→
    65→    // MARK: - Computed
    66→
    67→    var isChatAvailable: Bool {
    68→        chatService != nil
    69→    }
    70→
    71→    // MARK: - Actions
    72→
    73→    func loadHistory() async {
    74→        guard let repo = chatRepository else { return }
    75→        do {
    76→            messages = try await repo.loadMessages(limit: 50)
    77→        } catch {
    78→            handleError(error)
    79→        }
    80→        await loadQuickActions()
    81→    }
    82→
    83→    func sendMessage() {
    84→        let text = inputText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
    85→        guard !text.isEmpty, !isLoading, !isTyping else { return }
    86→
    87→        guard chatService != nil else {
    88→            errorMessage = ErrorMessage(
    89→                title: "error.openai.not_configured.title".localized,
    90→                message: "fitorb.error_no_api_key".localized,
    91→                action: .dismiss
    92→            )
    93→            return
    94→        }
    95→
    96→        // Cancel any ongoing typing animation
    97→        typingTask?.cancel()
    98→        typingTask = nil
    99→
   100→        let userMessage = AIChatMessage(role: .user, content: text)
   101→        messages.append(userMessage)
   102→        inputText = ""
   103→        isLoading = true
   104→        errorMessage = nil
   105→
   106→        Task {
   107→            // Check message limit for free users
   108→            if let gating = featureGating {
   109→                let access = await gating.checkAccess(to: .aiChat)
   110→                guard access.isAllowed else {
   111→                    isLoading = false
   112→                    // Remove the user message we just appended
   113→                    if messages.last?.role == .user {
   114→                        messages.removeLast()
   115→                    }
   116→                    handleError(DomainError.chatMessageLimitReached)
   117→                    return
   118→                }
   119→            }
   120→
   121→            // Save user message
   122→            try? await chatRepository?.saveMessage(userMessage)
   123→
   124→            do {
   125→                let response = try await chatService!.sendMessage(text, history: messages)
   126→
   127→                // Register chat usage
   128→                await usageTracker?.registerChatUsage()
   129→
   130→                // Animate typing effect
   131→                await animateTyping(response: response)
   132→            } catch {
   133→                handleError(error)
   134→            }
   135→            isLoading = false
   136→        }
   137→    }
   138→
   139→    func clearHistory() async {
   140→        typingTask?.cancel()
   141→        typingTask = nil
   142→        isTyping = false
   143→        messages.removeAll()
   144→        try? await chatRepository?.clearHistory()
   145→        await chatService?.invalidatePromptCache()
   146→        await loadQuickActions()
   147→    }
   148→
   149→    // MARK: - Typing Animation
   150→
   151→    private func animateTyping(response: String) async {
   152→        // Create assistant message with empty content
   153→        let messageId = UUID()
   154→        let placeholder = AIChatMessage(id: messageId, role: .assistant, content: "")
   155→        messages.append(placeholder)
   156→        isLoading = false
   157→        isTyping = true
   158→
   159→        let chunkSize = 5
   160→        var currentIndex = response.startIndex
   161→
   162→        typingTask = Task { [weak self] in
   163→            while currentIndex < response.endIndex && !Task.isCancelled {
   164→                let nextIndex = response.index(currentIndex, offsetBy: chunkSize, limitedBy: response.endIndex) ?? response.endIndex
   165→                let partialContent = String(response[response.startIndex..<nextIndex])
   166→                currentIndex = nextIndex
   167→
   168→                await MainActor.run {
   169→                    guard let self else { return }
   170→                    // Replace last message with updated content
   171→                    if let lastIndex = self.messages.lastIndex(where: { $0.id == messageId }) {
   172→                        self.messages[lastIndex] = AIChatMessage(
   173→                            id: messageId,
   174→                            role: .assistant,
   175→                            content: partialContent,
   176→                            timestamp: placeholder.timestamp
   177→                        )
   178→                    }
   179→                }
   180→
   181→                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 15_000_000) // 15ms
   182→            }
   183→
   184→            // Save final message after animation
   185→            let finalMessage = AIChatMessage(
   186→                id: messageId,
   187→                role: .assistant,
   188→                content: response,
   189→                timestamp: placeholder.timestamp
   190→            )
   191→
   192→            await MainActor.run { [weak self] in
   193→                guard let self else { return }
   194→                if let lastIndex = self.messages.lastIndex(where: { $0.id == messageId }) {
   195→                    self.messages[lastIndex] = finalMessage
   196→                }
   197→                self.isTyping = false
   198→            }
   199→
   200→            try? await self?.chatRepository?.saveMessage(finalMessage)
   201→        }
   202→    }
   203→
   204→    // MARK: - Quick Actions
   205→
   206→    private static var defaultQuickActions: [String] {
   207→        [
   208→            "fitorb.quick.plan_workout".localized,
   209→            "fitorb.quick.suggest_exercises".localized,
   210→            "fitorb.quick.warmup".localized,
   211→            "fitorb.quick.recovery".localized
   212→        ]
   213→    }
   214→
   215→    private func loadQuickActions() async {
   216→        var actions: [String] = []

   218→        let profile = try? await profileRepository?.loadProfile()
   219→        let stats = try? await statsRepository?.getCurrentStats()
   220→
   221→        let hour = Calendar.current.component(.hour, from: Date())
   222→
   223→        // Time-based suggestions

   226→        } else if hour >= 20 {

   228→        }
   229→
   230→        // Workout status today
   231→        if let lastDate = stats?.lastWorkoutDate,
   232→           Calendar.current.isDateInToday(lastDate) {
   233→            actions.append("fitorb.quick.recovery".localized)
   234→        } else {
   235→            actions.append("fitorb.quick.suggest_today".localized)
   236→        }
   237→
   238→        // Goal-specific suggestions
   239→        if let goal = profile?.mainGoal {
   240→            switch goal {
   241→            case .hypertrophy:
   242→                actions.append("fitorb.quick.muscle_tips".localized)
   243→            case .weightLoss:
   244→                actions.append("fitorb.quick.fat_burn_tips".localized)
   245→            case .endurance:
   246→                actions.append("fitorb.quick.endurance_tips".localized)
   247→            case .conditioning, .performance:
   248→                actions.append("fitorb.quick.performance_tips".localized)
   249→            }
   250→        }
   251→
   252→        // Always include a generic option
   253→        actions.append("fitorb.quick.plan_workout".localized)
   254→
   255→        // Limit to 4 chips
   256→        quickActions = Array(actions.prefix(4))
   257→
   258→        // Fallback if empty
   259→        if quickActions.isEmpty {
   260→            quickActions = Self.defaultQuickActions
   261→        }
   262→    }
   263→}

    42→        case .unlimitedHistory: return "Histórico ilimitado"
    43→        case .advancedDOMSAdjustment: return "Ajuste por dor muscular"

    45→        case .customizableSettings: return "Configurações avançadas"
    46→        case .personalTrainer: return "Personal Trainer"

    53→
    54→// MARK: - Access Result

    56→/// Resultado da verificação de acesso

    69→    /// Indicates if the result is due to a disabled feature flag.
    70→    var isFeatureDisabled: Bool {
    71→        if case .featureDisabled = self { return true }
    72→        return false
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    var message: String {
    76→        switch self {
    77→        case .allowed:
    78→            return ""
    79→        case .limitReached(_, let limit):
    80→            return "Você atingiu o limite de \(limit) usos. Desbloqueie o Pro para mais."
    81→        case .requiresPro(let feature):
    82→            return "\(feature.displayName) é um recurso Pro. Desbloqueie o Pro para acessar."
    83→        case .trialExpired:
    84→            return "Seu período de teste terminou. Desbloqueie o Pro para continuar."
    85→        case .featureDisabled(let reason):
    86→            return reason
    87→        }
    88→    }
    89→}
    90→
    91→// MARK: - Entitlement Policy
    92→
    93→/// Política centralizada para verificação de acesso a features
    94→struct EntitlementPolicy {
    95→
    96→    // MARK: - Limites
    97→
    98→    /// Número de treinos IA por semana para usuários Free
    99→    static let freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek = 1
   100→
   101→    /// Número de treinos IA por dia para usuários Pro
   102→    static let proAIWorkoutsPerDay = 2
   103→
   104→    /// Dias de histórico para usuários Free
   105→    static let freeHistoryDaysLimit = 7
   106→
   107→    /// Número máximo de desafios simultâneos para Free
   108→    static let freeChallengesLimit = 5
   109→
   110→    /// Numero de mensagens AI chat por dia para usuarios Free
   111→    static let freeAIChatMessagesPerDay = 5
   112→
   113→    // MARK: - Verificação de Acesso
   114→
   115→    /// Verifica se o usuário pode acessar uma feature
   116→    /// - Parameters:
   117→    ///   - feature: Feature a ser verificada
   118→    ///   - entitlement: Entitlement atual do usuário
   119→    ///   - usageCount: Uso atual (semanal para Free AI, diário para Pro AI, contagem ativa para desafios)
   120→    /// - Returns: Resultado da verificação
   121→    static func canAccess(
   122→        _ feature: ProFeature,
   123→        entitlement: ProEntitlement,
   124→        usageCount: Int = 0
   125→    ) -> FeatureAccessResult {
   126→
   127→        // Pro tem acesso a tudo (com limites diários em IA)
   128→        if entitlement.isPro {
   129→            if let expiration = entitlement.expirationDate, expiration < Date() {
   130→                return .trialExpired
   131→            }
   132→
   133→            switch feature {
   134→            case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   135→                if usageCount >= proAIWorkoutsPerDay {
   136→                    return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: proAIWorkoutsPerDay)
   137→                }
   138→                return .allowed
   139→            case .aiChat:
   140→                return .allowed
   141→            default:
   142→                return .allowed
   143→            }
   144→        }
   145→
   146→        // Verificar features específicas para Free
   147→        switch feature {
   148→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   149→            if usageCount >= freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek {
   150→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek)
   151→            }
   152→            return .allowed
   153→
   154→        case .simultaneousChallenges:
   155→            if usageCount >= freeChallengesLimit {
   156→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeChallengesLimit)
   157→            }
   158→            return .allowed
   159→
   160→        case .aiChat:
   161→            if usageCount >= freeAIChatMessagesPerDay {
   162→                return .limitReached(remaining: 0, limit: freeAIChatMessagesPerDay)
   163→            }
   164→            return .allowed
   165→
   166→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution,
   167→             .unlimitedHistory,
   168→             .advancedDOMSAdjustment,
   169→             .premiumPrograms,
   170→             .customizableSettings,
   171→             .personalTrainer,
   172→             .trainerWorkouts:
   173→            return .requiresPro(feature: feature)
   174→        }
   175→    }
   176→
   177→    /// Verifica se uma feature é totalmente bloqueada para Free
   178→    static func isProOnly(_ feature: ProFeature) -> Bool {
   179→        switch feature {
   180→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration, .simultaneousChallenges, .aiChat:
   181→            return false // Free tem acesso limitado
   182→        case .aiExerciseSubstitution,
   183→             .unlimitedHistory,
   184→             .advancedDOMSAdjustment,
   185→             .premiumPrograms,
   186→             .customizableSettings,
   187→             .personalTrainer,
   188→             .trainerWorkouts:
   189→            return true
   190→        }
   191→    }
   192→
   193→    /// Retorna o limite de uso para uma feature
   194→    static func usageLimit(for feature: ProFeature, entitlement: ProEntitlement) -> (limit: Int, period: String)? {
   195→        switch feature {
   196→        case .aiWorkoutGeneration:
   197→            if entitlement.isPro {
   198→                return (proAIWorkoutsPerDay, "dia")
   199→            } else {
   200→                return (freeAIWorkoutsPerWeek, "semana")
   201→            }
   202→        case .simultaneousChallenges:
   203→            if entitlement.isPro {
   204→                return nil // ilimitado
   205→            } else {
   206→                return (freeChallengesLimit, "simultâneos")
   207→            }
   208→        case .aiChat:
   209→            if entitlement.isPro {
   210→                return nil // ilimitado
   211→            } else {
   212→                return (freeAIChatMessagesPerDay, "dia")
   213→            }
   214→        default:
   215→            return nil
   216→        }
   217→    }
   218→
   219→    // MARK: - Helpers para UI
   220→
   221→    /// Retorna lista de features que são Pro-only para exibição
   222→    static var proOnlyFeatures: [ProFeature] {
   223→        ProFeature.allCases.filter { isProOnly($0) }
   224→    }
   225→
   226→    /// Retorna lista de features com limites para Free
   227→    static var limitedFreeFeatures: [(feature: ProFeature, freeLimit: String, proLimit: String)] {
   228→        [
   229→            (.aiWorkoutGeneration, "1/semana", "2/dia"),
   230→            (.simultaneousChallenges, "5", "∞"),
   231→            (.aiChat, "5/dia", "ilimitado")
   232→        ]
   233→    }
   234→}
   235→
   236→// MARK: - Convenience Extensions
   237→
   238→extension ProEntitlement {
   239→    /// Verifica acesso a uma feature usando a policy centralizada
   240→    func canAccess(_ feature: ProFeature, usageCount: Int = 0) -> FeatureAccessResult {
   241→        EntitlementPolicy.canAccess(feature, entitlement: self, usageCount: usageCount)
   242→    }
   243→
   244→    /// Verifica se tem acesso a uma feature (simplificado)
   245→    func hasAccess(to feature: ProFeature) -> Bool {
   246→        canAccess(feature).isAllowed
   247→    }
   248→}
   249→

Done. Here's a summary of the changes:

**3 files changed:**

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `EntitlementPolicy.swift` | Reduced `freeAIChatMessagesPerDay` from **5 → 1** and updated the display string |

**Behavior:**
- Free users get **1 free message per day**
- On the **2nd message** (or clicking a suggestion chip after using the free one), the **paywall sheet** is presented instead of an error alert
- After a successful purchase, the paywall dismisses automatically
- Pro users continue with unlimited messages

content.content:
title:	feat: Integração ponta a ponta do chat entre aluno e personal (Firestore + FCM)
state:	OPEN
author:	Viniciuscarvalho
labels:	
comments:	0
assignees:	
projects:	
milestone:	
number:	51
--
## Contexto

A UI de chat entre aluno e personal já existe em ambos os lados, mas nenhum dos dois está conectado ao backend real — tudo roda em mock ou parcialmente implementado. Esta issue cobre a integração ponta a ponta.

---

## Estado atual

### iOS — TrainerChatViewModel (100% mock)

**Arquivo:** `Presentation/Features/PersonalTrainer/TrainerChatViewModel.swift`

```swift
// Mensagens são inventadas no init — nada vai ao Firestore
private func loadMockMessages() {
    messages = [
        ChatMessage(id: "1", text: "trainer.chat.mock.msg1".localized, ...),
        ...
    ]
}

// sendMessage() só adiciona localmente — não escreve no Firestore
func sendMessage() {
    messages.append(ChatMessage(...))
    newMessageText = ""
}
```

- Sem listener em tempo real
- Sem escrita no Firestore
- Sem push notification ao personal quando aluno envia mensagem
- `ChatRepository` existente é exclusivo para o chat com IA (FitOrb) — não serve o chat com personal

### CMS — messages/page.tsx (parcialmente real, parcialmente mock)

**Arquivo:** `app/(dashboard)/cms/messages/page.tsx`

- ✅ Leitura de mensagens é real: `onSnapshot` em `conversations/{id}/messages`
- ✅ Envio de mensagem é real: `addDoc` em `conversations/{id}/messages`
- ❌ Listagem de conversas é mock: lê `subscriptions` e monta objetos falsos sem criar documentos em `conversations/`
- ❌ Sem FCM push para o aluno quando o personal envia uma mensagem
- ❌ `unreadCount: Math.floor(Math.random() * 3)` — contador de não lidos aleatório

---

## Estrutura Firestore acordada

Usar um `conversationId` determinístico para evitar duplicatas:

```
conversationId = "\(min(trainerId, studentId))_\(max(trainerId, studentId))"
```

Coleções:

```
conversations/{conversationId}
  ├── trainerId: String
  ├── studentId: String
  ├── lastMessage: String
  ├── lastMessageAt: Timestamp
  ├── unreadByTrainer: Int       ← incrementa quando aluno envia
  └── unreadByStudent: Int       ← incrementa quando personal envia

conversations/{conversationId}/messages/{messageId}
  ├── senderId: String
  ├── content: String
  ├── type: "text"
  ├── createdAt: Timestamp
  └── isRead: Bool
```

---

## O que precisa ser implementado

### iOS (FitToday)

**1. FirebaseTrainerChatService** — novo `actor`
- `observeMessages(conversationId:) -> AsyncStream<[TrainerChatMessage]>` via `addSnapshotListener`
- `sendMessage(conversationId:, senderId:, content:)` — escreve em `conversations/{id}/messages` + atualiza `lastMessage` e `unreadByTrainer` no documento pai
- `markMessagesAsRead(conversationId:, byStudent:)` — zera `unreadByStudent`
- Criar documento `conversations/{id}` se não existir (primeira mensagem)

**2. TrainerChatViewModel — substituir mock por Firestore**
- Injetar `FirebaseTrainerChatService`
- Substituir `loadMockMessages()` por `observeMessages()` com listener em tempo real
- `sendMessage()` deve chamar o service (escrita no Firestore) + manter append local otimista
- Exibir estado de loading enquanto mensagens carregam pela primeira vez
- Exibir estado vazio se não há mensagens ainda

**3. Push Notification — aluno notifica personal**
- Ao enviar mensagem, buscar FCM token do personal em `users/{trainerId}/fcmToken`
- Enviar push via Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) com título "Nova mensagem" e preview do conteúdo
- Ao receber notificação, navegar para `TrainerChatView` com o `conversationId` correto

**4. Receber notificações quando o personal responde**
- Configurar handler de notificação push para mensagens de chat no `AppDelegate` / `FitTodayApp`
- Ao abrir pelo push, navegar diretamente para a conversa correta via `AppRouter`

### Firestore Security Rules

```js
match /conversations/{conversationId} {
  allow read, write: if request.auth.uid == resource.data.trainerId
                     || request.auth.uid == resource.data.studentId;

  match /messages/{messageId} {
    allow read: if request.auth.uid == get(/databases/$(database)/documents/conversations/$(conversationId)).data.trainerId
                || request.auth.uid == get(/databases/$(database)/documents/conversations/$(conversationId)).data.studentId;
    allow create: if request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.senderId;
  }
}
```

---

## Checklist

### iOS
- [ ] Criar `Data/Services/Firebase/FirebaseTrainerChatService.swift` com `observeMessages`, `sendMessage`, `markAsRead`
- [ ] Criar protocolo `TrainerChatServiceProtocol` em `Domain/Protocols/`
- [ ] Substituir mock em `TrainerChatViewModel` por `FirebaseTrainerChatService`
- [ ] Adicionar listener em tempo real (`AsyncStream`) no ViewModel — UI atualiza sem pull-to-refresh
- [ ] Estado de loading na primeira carga e empty state sem mensagens
- [ ] Envio otimista: mensagem aparece imediatamente, confirma/desfaz na resposta do Firestore
- [ ] Ao enviar mensagem, disparar FCM push para o personal

- [ ] Ao abrir pelo push, navegar para `TrainerChatView` com `conversationId` correto via `AppRouter`
- [ ] Registrar `FirebaseTrainerChatService` no `AppContainer`
- [ ] Zerар `unreadByStudent` ao abrir a conversa (`markAsRead`)

### Firestore
- [ ] Definir e documentar schema de `conversations/{id}` e `conversations/{id}/messages/{id}`
- [ ] Configurar Security Rules para que só trainer e student da conversa leiam/escrevam
- [ ] Criar índice composto: `conversations` por `studentId` + `lastMessageAt` desc (para o app listar conversas do aluno)

## Notas

- `conversationId` determinístico `min_max` evita criar dois documentos para o mesmo par trainer-student
- O `ChatRepository` existente (`SwiftDataChatRepository`) é exclusivo do chat com IA (FitOrb) — não modificar

--
## Contexto

A UI de chat entre aluno e personal já existe em ambos os lados, mas nenhum dos dois está conectado ao backend real — tudo roda em mock ou parcialmente implementado. Esta issue cobre a integração ponta a ponta.

---

## Estado atual

### iOS — TrainerChatViewModel (100% mock)

**Arquivo:** `Presentation/Features/PersonalTrainer/TrainerChatViewModel.swift`

```swift
// Mensagens são inventadas no init — nada vai ao Firestore
private func loadMockMessages() {
    messages = [
        ChatMessage(id: "1", text: "trainer.chat.mock.msg1".localized, ...),
        ...
    ]
}

// sendMessage() só adiciona localmente — não escreve no Firestore
func sendMessage() {
    messages.append(ChatMessage(...))
    newMessageText = ""
}
```

- Sem listener em tempo real
- Sem escrita no Firestore
- Sem push notification ao personal quando aluno envia mensagem
- `ChatRepository` existente é exclusivo para o chat com IA (FitOrb) — não serve o chat com personal

### CMS — messages/page.tsx (parcialmente real, parcialmente mock)

**Arquivo:** `app/(dashboard)/cms/messages/page.tsx`

- ✅ Leitura de mensagens é real: `onSnapshot` em `conversations/{id}/messages`
- ✅ Envio de mensagem é real: `addDoc` em `conversations/{id}/messages`
- ❌ Listagem de conversas é mock: lê `subscriptions` e monta objetos falsos sem criar documentos em `conversations/`
- ❌ Sem FCM push para o aluno quando o personal envia uma mensagem
- ❌ `unreadCount: Math.floor(Math.random() * 3)` — contador de não lidos aleatório

---

## Estrutura Firestore acordada

Usar um `conversationId` determinístico para evitar duplicatas:

```
conversationId = "\(min(trainerId, studentId))_\(max(trainerId, studentId))"
```

Coleções:

```
conversations/{conversationId}
  ├── trainerId: String
  ├── studentId: String
  ├── lastMessage: String
  ├── lastMessageAt: Timestamp
  ├── unreadByTrainer: Int       ← incrementa quando aluno envia
  └── unreadByStudent: Int       ← incrementa quando personal envia

conversations/{conversationId}/messages/{messageId}
  ├── senderId: String
  ├── content: String
  ├── type: "text"
  ├── createdAt: Timestamp
  └── isRead: Bool
```

---

## O que precisa ser implementado

### iOS (FitToday)

**1. FirebaseTrainerChatService** — novo `actor`
- `observeMessages(conversationId:) -> AsyncStream<[TrainerChatMessage]>` via `addSnapshotListener`
- `sendMessage(conversationId:, senderId:, content:)` — escreve em `conversations/{id}/messages` + atualiza `lastMessage` e `unreadByTrainer` no documento pai
- `markMessagesAsRead(conversationId:, byStudent:)` — zera `unreadByStudent`
- Criar documento `conversations/{id}` se não existir (primeira mensagem)

**2. TrainerChatViewModel — substituir mock por Firestore**
- Injetar `FirebaseTrainerChatService`
- Substituir `loadMockMessages()` por `observeMessages()` com listener em tempo real
- `sendMessage()` deve chamar o service (escrita no Firestore) + manter append local otimista
- Exibir estado de loading enquanto mensagens carregam pela primeira vez
- Exibir estado vazio se não há mensagens ainda

**3. Push Notification — aluno notifica personal**
- Ao enviar mensagem, buscar FCM token do personal em `users/{trainerId}/fcmToken`
- Enviar push via Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) com título "Nova mensagem" e preview do conteúdo
- Ao receber notificação, navegar para `TrainerChatView` com o `conversationId` correto

**4. Receber notificações quando o personal responde**
- Configurar handler de notificação push para mensagens de chat no `AppDelegate` / `FitTodayApp`
- Ao abrir pelo push, navegar diretamente para a conversa correta via `AppRouter`

### Firestore Security Rules

```js
match /conversations/{conversationId} {
  allow read, write: if request.auth.uid == resource.data.trainerId
                     || request.auth.uid == resource.data.studentId;

  match /messages/{messageId} {
    allow read: if request.auth.uid == get(/databases/$(database)/documents/conversations/$(conversationId)).data.trainerId
                || request.auth.uid == get(/databases/$(database)/documents/conversations/$(conversationId)).data.studentId;
    allow create: if request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.senderId;
  }
}
```

---

## Checklist

### iOS
- [ ] Criar `Data/Services/Firebase/FirebaseTrainerChatService.swift` com `observeMessages`, `sendMessage`, `markAsRead`
- [ ] Criar protocolo `TrainerChatServiceProtocol` em `Domain/Protocols/`
- [ ] Substituir mock em `TrainerChatViewModel` por `FirebaseTrainerChatService`
- [ ] Adicionar listener em tempo real (`AsyncStream`) no ViewModel — UI atualiza sem pull-to-refresh
- [ ] Estado de loading na primeira carga e empty state sem mensagens
- [ ] Envio otimista: mensagem aparece imediatamente, confirma/desfaz na resposta do Firestore
- [ ] Ao enviar mensagem, disparar FCM push para o personal
- [ ] Registrar handler de push para tipo `chat_message` no `AppDelegate`
- [ ] Ao abrir pelo push, navegar para `TrainerChatView` com `conversationId` correto via `AppRouter`
- [ ] Registrar `FirebaseTrainerChatService` no `AppContainer`
- [ ] Zerар `unreadByStudent` ao abrir a conversa (`markAsRead`)

### Firestore
- [ ] Definir e documentar schema de `conversations/{id}` e `conversations/{id}/messages/{id}`
- [ ] Configurar Security Rules para que só trainer e student da conversa leiam/escrevam
- [ ] Criar índice composto: `conversations` por `studentId` + `lastMessageAt` desc (para o app listar conversas do aluno)

## Notas

- `conversationId` determinístico `min_max` evita criar dois documentos para o mesmo par trainer-student
- O `ChatRepository` existente (`SwiftDataChatRepository`) é exclusivo do chat com IA (FitOrb) — não modificar
- FCM token do aluno já é salvo em `users/{uid}/fcmToken` (usado na issue de upload de workout) — reutilizar o mesmo campo para push de chat
- A UI (`TrainerChatView` e `ChatBubble`) já está pronta e não precisa de alterações visuais

     5→//  ViewModel for trainer chat interface.
     6→//  Currently uses mock data — real chat backend to be integrated later.

     8→
     9→import Foundation
    10→
    11→/// A single chat message between trainer and student.
    12→struct ChatMessage: Identifiable, Sendable {
    13→    let id: String
    14→    let text: String
    15→    let senderId: String
    16→    let timestamp: Date
    17→    let isFromTrainer: Bool
    18→}
    19→
    20→@MainActor
    21→@Observable final class TrainerChatViewModel {
    22→    private(set) var messages: [ChatMessage] = []
    23→    var newMessageText = ""
    24→
    25→    private let trainerId: String
    26→    private let trainerName: String
    27→
    28→    var canSend: Bool {
    29→        !newMessageText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    init(trainerId: String, trainerName: String) {
    33→        self.trainerId = trainerId
    34→        self.trainerName = trainerName
    35→        loadMockMessages()
    36→    }
    37→
    38→    func sendMessage() {
    39→        guard canSend else { return }
    40→        let message = ChatMessage(
    41→            id: UUID().uuidString,
    42→            text: newMessageText.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines),
    43→            senderId: "current_user",
    44→            timestamp: Date(),
    45→            isFromTrainer: false
    46→        )
    47→        messages.append(message)
    48→        newMessageText = ""
    49→    }
    50→
    51→    private func loadMockMessages() {
    52→        let calendar = Calendar.current
    53→        let now = Date()
    54→        messages = [
    55→            ChatMessage(id: "1", text: "trainer.chat.mock.msg1".localized, senderId: trainerId, timestamp: calendar.date(byAdding: .hour, value: -2, to: now)!, isFromTrainer: true),
    56→            ChatMessage(id: "2", text: "trainer.chat.mock.msg2".localized, senderId: "current_user", timestamp: calendar.date(byAdding: .hour, value: -1, to: now)!, isFromTrainer: false),
    57→            ChatMessage(id: "3", text: "trainer.chat.mock.msg3".localized, senderId: trainerId, timestamp: calendar.date(byAdding: .minute, value: -45, to: now)!, isFromTrainer: true),
    58→            ChatMessage(id: "4", text: "trainer.chat.mock.msg4".localized, senderId: "current_user", timestamp: calendar.date(byAdding: .minute, value: -30, to: now)!, isFromTrainer: false),
    59→            ChatMessage(id: "5", text: "trainer.chat.mock.msg5".localized, senderId: trainerId, timestamp: calendar.date(byAdding: .minute, value: -10, to: now)!, isFromTrainer: true),
    60→        ]
    61→    }
    62→}

     8→import Foundation
     9→import SwiftUI
    10→
    11→enum AppTab: Hashable, CaseIterable {
    12→    case home
    13→    case workout
    14→    case fitorb
    15→    case activity
    16→    case profile
    17→
    18→    var title: String {
    19→        switch self {
    20→        case .home: return "tab.home".localized
    21→        case .workout: return "tab.workout".localized
    22→        case .fitorb: return "tab.fitorb".localized
    23→        case .activity: return "tab.activity".localized
    24→        case .profile: return "tab.profile".localized
    25→        }
    26→    }
    27→
    28→    var systemImage: String {
    29→        switch self {
    30→        case .home: return "house.fill"
    31→        case .workout: return "dumbbell.fill"
    32→        case .fitorb: return "sparkles"
    33→        case .activity: return "chart.bar.fill"
    34→        case .profile: return "person.fill"
    35→        }
    36→    }
    37→}
    38→
    39→enum AppRoute: Hashable {
    40→    case onboarding
    41→    case editProfile  // Rota separada para edição de perfil existente
    42→    case setup
    43→    case workoutPlan(UUID)
    44→    case exerciseDetail
    45→    case workoutExecution  // Nova view de execução com timer e pause/play
    46→    case workoutExercisePreview(ExercisePrescription)  // Preview de exercício (não altera índice)
    47→    case workoutPreview(ProgramWorkout)  // Preview de treino antes de iniciar (Task 7.0)
    48→    case workoutSummary
    49→    case paywall
    50→    case programDetail(String)  // Detalhe do programa
    51→    case programWorkoutDetail(ProgramWorkout)  // Detalhe de um treino dentro do programa
    52→    case libraryWorkoutDetail(String)  // Detalhe de um treino da biblioteca (por ID)
    53→    case programExerciseDetail(ExercisePrescription)  // Detalhe de exercício na biblioteca/programa
    54→    case apiKeySettings  // Configuração de chave de API do usuário
    55→    case healthKitSettings // Integração Apple Health (PRO)
    56→    case privacySettings  // Privacy settings for social features
    57→    case authentication(inviteContext: String?)  // Authentication flow
    58→    case groupInvite(groupId: String)  // Group invitation deep link
    59→    case notifications  // Notifications screen for challenges
    60→    case customWorkouts  // Custom workout templates list
    61→    case customWorkoutBuilder(UUID?)  // Create or edit custom workout (nil = new)
    62→    case personalTrainer  // Personal Trainer connection and workouts
    63→    case trainerSearch  // Search for personal trainers
    64→    case trainerDashboard  // Trainer dashboard (tabs: Today, Chat, History)
    65→    case trainerChat  // Direct access to trainer chat tab
    66→    case cmsWorkoutDetail(String)  // CMS workout detail by ID
    67→    case cmsWorkoutFeedback(String)  // CMS workout feedback by ID
    68→    case aiChat  // AI Fitness Assistant (FitOrb)
    69→}
    70→
    71→struct DeepLink {
    72→    enum Destination {
    73→        case home
    74→        case onboarding
    75→        case setup
    76→        case paywall
    77→        case groupInvite(groupId: String)
    78→        case trainerDashboard
    79→        case trainerChat
    80→    }
    81→
    82→    let destination: Destination
    83→
    84→    init?(url: URL) {
    85→        guard let scheme = url.scheme?.lowercased(), scheme == "fittoday" else {
    86→            return nil
    87→        }
    88→
    89→        let host = url.host?.lowercased() ?? ""
    90→        let path = url.path.lowercased()
    91→
    92→        // Handle group invite: fittoday://group/invite/{groupId}
    93→        if host == "group", path.hasPrefix("/invite/") {
    94→            let groupId = String(path.dropFirst("/invite/".count))
    95→            destination = .groupInvite(groupId: groupId)
    96→            return
    97→        }
    98→
    99→        // Handle trainer routes: fittoday://trainer/dashboard, fittoday://trainer/chat
   100→        if host == "trainer" {
   101→            switch path.lowercased() {
   102→            case "/dashboard":
   103→                destination = .trainerDashboard
   104→                return
   105→            case "/chat":
   106→                destination = .trainerChat
   107→                return
   108→            default:
   109→                break
   110→            }
   111→        }
   112→
   113→        // Handle other routes
   114→        let pathOrHost = !host.isEmpty ? host : path
   115→        switch pathOrHost {
   116→        case "home", "/home":
   117→            destination = .home
   118→        case "onboarding", "/onboarding":
   119→            destination = .onboarding
   120→        case "setup", "/setup":
   121→            destination = .setup
   122→        case "paywall", "/paywall":
   123→            destination = .paywall
   124→        default:
   125→            return nil
   126→        }
   127→    }
   128→}
   129→
   130→@MainActor
   131→protocol AppRouting: AnyObject {
   132→    var selectedTab: AppTab { get set }
   133→    var tabPaths: [AppTab: NavigationPath] { get set }
   134→
   135→    func select(tab: AppTab)
   136→    func push(_ route: AppRoute, on tab: AppTab?)
   137→    func pop(on tab: AppTab?)
   138→    func handle(deeplink: DeepLink)
   139→}
   140→
   141→// 💡 Learn: Navegação com @Observable permite melhor performance
   142→@MainActor
   143→@Observable final class AppRouter: AppRouting {
   144→    var selectedTab: AppTab = .home
   145→    var tabPaths: [AppTab: NavigationPath] = [:]
   146→
   147→    init() {
   148→        AppTab.allCases.forEach { tab in
   149→            tabPaths[tab] = NavigationPath()
   150→        }
   151→    }
   152→
   153→    func select(tab: AppTab) {
   154→        selectedTab = tab
   155→    }
   156→
   157→    func push(_ route: AppRoute, on tab: AppTab? = nil) {
   158→        let target = tab ?? selectedTab
   159→        if tabPaths[target] == nil {
   160→            tabPaths[target] = NavigationPath()
   161→        }
   162→        tabPaths[target]?.append(route)
   163→    }
   164→
   165→    func pop(on tab: AppTab? = nil) {
   166→        let target = tab ?? selectedTab
   167→        guard var path = tabPaths[target], !path.isEmpty else {
   168→            return
   169→        }
   170→        path.removeLast()
   171→        tabPaths[target] = path
   172→    }
   173→
   174→    func handle(deeplink: DeepLink) {
   175→        switch deeplink.destination {
   176→        case .home:
   177→            select(tab: .home)
   178→        case .onboarding:
   179→            select(tab: .home)
   180→            push(.onboarding, on: .home)
   181→        case .setup:
   182→            select(tab: .home)
   183→            push(.setup, on: .home)
   184→        case .paywall:
   185→            select(tab: .home)
   186→            push(.paywall, on: .home)
   187→        case .groupInvite(let groupId):
   188→            select(tab: .home)
   189→            push(.groupInvite(groupId: groupId), on: .home)
   190→        case .trainerDashboard:
   191→            select(tab: .home)
   192→            push(.trainerDashboard, on: .home)
   193→        case .trainerChat:
   194→            select(tab: .home)
   195→            push(.trainerChat, on: .home)
   196→        }
   197→    }
   198→
   199→    func handle(url: URL) {
   200→        guard let link = DeepLink(url: url) else { return }
   201→        handle(deeplink: link)
   202→    }
   203→}
   204→
